summary: Iteration 69: Verified GST Bug Fix for Amazon/Marketplace Orders. All 16 backend tests pass. The fix correctly reverse-calculates taxable_value from GST-inclusive price for marketplace orders (Amazon, Flipkart).
critical_code_review_comments: GST bug fix implementation is correct and complete
bot_dispatch_order (lines 35501-35556): Correctly identifies marketplace orders and reverse-calculates taxable_value
bot_prepare_dispatch (lines 35663-35745): Returns is_gst_inclusive flag and correct pricing breakdown
mark_amazon_dispatched (lines 36605-36642): Correctly sets price_is_gst_inclusive=True and calculates taxable_value
create_sales_invoice_from_dispatch (lines 4139-4182): Prioritizes dispatch's taxable_value when available
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified the GST bug fix for marketplace orders. Key implementation details: 1) For Amazon/Flipkart orders, invoice_value is GST-inclusive, 2) taxable_value = invoice_value / (1 + gst_rate/100), 3) gst_amount = invoice_value - taxable_value, 4) dispatch_doc now has price_is_gst_inclusive and is_marketplace_order flags, 5) create_sales_invoice_from_dispatch uses dispatch's taxable_value when available. Example: ₹41,500 (5% GST inclusive) → taxable=₹39,523.81, gst=₹1,976.19

original_bug_scenario.details: ₹41,500 (5% GST inclusive) → CORRECT: taxable=₹39,523.81, gst=₹1,976.19. BUG would have: ₹43,575 (WRONG)

bot_dispatch_order_gst_fields.details: Creates dispatch with price_is_gst_inclusive=true, taxable_value, gst_amount for marketplace orders

prepare_dispatch_is_gst_inclusive_flag.details: Returns is_gst_inclusive flag in pricing object for marketplace orders

mark_amazon_dispatched_gst_calculation.details: Reverse-calculates taxable_value from GST-inclusive price for historical Amazon orders

create_sales_invoice_uses_dispatch_taxab.details: Prioritizes dispatch's pre-calculated taxable_value when available
